title: Knock U Back
description: Snowballs and eggs knock players back.
body:
# Knock U Back
A simple mod enable snowballs and eggs to hit Players and knockback Players.

It changes only the hit result of **snowballs** and **eggs** from **Players** to **Players**, nothing else affected.
### Commands
```
/knockuback enabled set true
```
Enable the mod (**enabled** by default)

```
/knockuback allowCombo set true
```
Enable combo to hit player multiple times within 20 ticks (**disabled** by default)

```
/knockuback comboTick set <int number>
```
Set the invulnerable duration (to eggs and snowballs) after being hit.

```
/knockuback damageArmor set true
```
Enable eggs and snowballs damages player's armor by 1 for each hit. (**disabled** by default)

```
/knockuback causeAggro set true
```
Enable eggs and snowballs aggro player's dogs. (**enabled** by default)

```
/knockuback allowAirHit set true
```
Update player's Y speed when hit in the air, making (**disabled** by default)
